induction_input: The cat the dog chased escaped.
The book the student read interested.
The car the mechanic fixed broke.
The house the builder designed collapsed.
The food the chef prepared spoiled.
induced_prompt_raw: Noun phrase with center-embedded relative clause.
induced_prompt: Noun phrase with center-embedded relative clause.
l2_sentences: The cat that the dog that the boy owned chased escaped.
The book that the professor who the students respected wrote became a bestseller.
The house that the architect who the magazine featured designed won an award.
The car that the mechanic that the dealership hired repaired broke down again.
The painting that the artist who the gallery represented created sold for a million dollars.
